description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult human figure, depicted in a standing pose with arms slightly extended outward. The figure is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeved top and matching pants, both of which appear to be made from a smooth, fabric-like material. The top features a circular emblem with a stylized human silhouette at the center of the chest. The figure has a well-defined head with short, textured hair and realistic facial features. The hands and feet are exposed, showing detailed fingers and toes. The overall build is proportionate, suggesting an average adult male physique suitable for urban environments.
description: A standing adult human figure in fitted long-sleeve top and pants, with a chest emblem and exposed hands and feet. The figure has short, textured hair and realistic proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the emblem on the chest, facial features, and both hands and feet clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full back of the clothing, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right arm's extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved fitted top and matching pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
